questionHtml: Calculate the excess demand/excess supply (state which of these) at a price of $8.50.
markschemeHtml:
Qd = 249 − 4 × 8.50 = 215
Qs = 150 + 14 × 8.50 = 269

Any valid working is sufficient for [1].

There will be excess supply or a surplus of 54.

An answer of 54 (without working) is sufficient for [1].
